summary: Comprehensive testing of True Joy Birthing subscription system for App Store submission. All backend subscription APIs tested and working correctly. 14-day trial period, $29/month, $276/year pricing verified. Demo accounts (Doula trial, Midwife active annual) verified working. Frontend login flow encountered React Native Web + Playwright interaction issues, but backend subscription functionality is fully operational.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web Button component (rendered as DIV) click not triggering form submission in Playwright automation
integration_issues.priority: LOW - Testing artifact only, not app issue

activate_subscription_api.verified: Both monthly and annual activation working

change_plan_api.verified: Monthly to annual upgrade working, old_plan/new_plan/is_upgrade returned

trial_upgrade_flow.verified: Trial users can successfully upgrade to paid subscription

critical_code_review_comments: Subscription pricing correctly shows 14-day trial (updated from 30 days)
SubscriptionPage.tsx correctly handles trial-to-paid upgrade flow
Monthly-to-annual upgrade path (change-plan endpoint) working correctly
IAP purchases are MOCKED on web - real StoreKit/Google Play only works on native builds

success_rate.frontend: Not fully testable via Playwright due to RN Web component interaction

seed_data_creation: None needed - demo accounts have trial and active subscription states
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend subscription APIs fully tested and working. Frontend subscription UI components (SubscriptionPage.tsx) have correct logic for: (1) Showing trial status with days remaining (2) Trial-to-paid upgrade options (3) Monthly-to-annual upgrade for active subscribers (4) 14-day trial period. IAP is MOCKED on web. Playwright struggles with React Native Web Button click events - use manual browser testing or consider adding data-testid to login button.

mocked_apis.note: In-App Purchases are MOCKED on web. Real IAP only works on native iOS/Android builds via StoreKit/Google Play.
